summary: Audit --DryRun flag and Invoke-WithTimeout shared helper
changes: Added --DryRun flag to audit symlink check (Test-VerifySymlinks) -- previews repairs without modifying filesystem
Added Invoke-WithTimeout shared helper (scripts/shared/invoke-with-timeout.ps1) -- runs script blocks in background jobs with configurable timeout and detailed logging
Added 6 timeout* log message keys to scripts/shared/log-messages.json
Updated spec/audit/readme.md with --DryRun usage and examples
